description: Compliance checks for IFC-SG and AIM submission requirements in Singapore
name: IFC-SG Submission Compliance

rules.description: IFC-SG typically requires Revit 2024 or later
rules.name: Revit Version

rules.description: Required fields for BCA e-submission: Project Name, Project Number, Client Name, Project Address, Author, Organization Name
rules.name: Project Information - BCA Required Fields

rules.description: Survey Point N/S should match SVY21 Northing coordinate from surveyor
rules.name: Survey Point - N/S (SVY21)

rules.description: Survey Point E/W should match SVY21 Easting coordinate from surveyor
rules.name: Survey Point - E/W (SVY21)

rules.description: Survey Point elevation should match Singapore Height Datum (SHD) from surveyor
rules.name: Survey Point - Elevation (SHD)

rules.description: Project Base Point should be at origin (0,0,0) for clean IFC export
rules.name: Project Base Point - Origin

rules.description: Project Base Point E/W should be at origin for clean IFC export
rules.name: Project Base Point - E/W Origin

rules.description: Project Base Point elevation should be at 0 for clean IFC export
rules.name: Project Base Point - Elevation Origin

rules.description: No Design Options should exist before IFC-SG submission
rules.name: Design Options Cleanup

params.message_over: Design Options MUST be resolved before IFC-SG submission

rules.description: A Starting View must be set for model navigation
rules.name: Starting View

rules.description: Report True North rotation angle for IFC coordinate alignment
rules.name: True North Angle

rules.description: Worksets should follow Singapore BIM Guide naming convention
rules.name: Workset Naming (BIM Guide)

author: DQT
